dataHooks.prisma-singleton: lib/prisma.ts exports { prisma } — adapter-pg over DATABASE_URL
dataHooks.pipeline-jobs: PipelineJob table; workers claim queued or stale RUNNING jobs via FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED, default lease 300000 ms, nullable idempotencyKey prevents duplicate downstream jobs
dataHooks.pipeline-failure-state: Terminal PipelineJob failures set JobStatus.FAILED and atomically set CaseStatus.FAILED plus Case.failureReason when a case can be resolved
dataHooks.short-circuit-report: Diagnosis.report stores lightweight-report.v1 before CaseStatus.REVIEW; diagnosis and letter are explicitly SKIPPED and sonnetCallAvoided is true
dataHooks.api-auth-boundary: All /api/v1 routes except health fail closed with 401 until hashed org-token persistence, verification, revocation, and tenant resolution are implemented

stage-payload-columns.letters: GeneratedLetter.body + complianceGatePassed (export gate keys off this field)

buildChanges.change: Repo initialized: scaffold, Prisma 7 layer, stage 1-2 contracts, tokens, 3 UI primitives. All verification green (tsc, lint:tokens, prisma validate/generate, next build).
Prisma generator output relocated src/generated -> lib/generated (no-src invariant). PrismaClient wired through @prisma/adapter-pg (engine-less client requires adapter).
Workspace automation: .cursor/rules (3 mdc), CLAUDE.md, memory_state.json, headless /app/api/v1 scaffold. Weeks 3-4: TriggerBar, diagnose.contract.ts, workflows/engine.ts.

Weeks 3-4 verified: tsc clean, lint:tokens pass, next build green (8 /api/v1 dynamic routes), smoke-pipeline 14/14 (full handoff, short-circuit, compliance gate rejection). Zod input schemas relocated from route files to lib/api-schemas.ts (Next route-export constraint).

Phase 1 hardening verified: 36 Bun tests, Prisma validate/generate, strict TypeScript, token lint, Next production build without the prior tracing-root warning, and pipeline smoke checks all passed. Includes contract repair/probability validation, current ISO normalization, filesystem containment, fail-closed API auth, stale job reclaim, transactional/idempotent workflow persistence, terminal case failure state, and lightweight-report.v1.

nextTargets: Short-circuit gate counter instrumentation (sonnet calls avoided >= 15%)
Parallel RAG retrieval seeded from phrase categories (week 6)
Hashed org-scoped API token persistence, safe verification, revocation, tenant resolution, and rate limits for /app/api/v1
